title: Resolve pre-existing rule-script drift before issue 393
context: Planning for issue #393 found 15 RS-RULE-ADDED findings in codebase-health.md and health-retest.md. The strict feature-development policy blocks planning while this drift exists. Resolving it expands scope beyond #393; stopping leaves #393 unbuilt.

options.label: Run analyze rules and reconcile the 15 findings
Stop issue #393 until the drift is fixed separately

rationale: User explicitly requested rules analysis based on the dogfooded paqad-ai npm package, with writes limited to docs and .paqad.
